fix_references: Arrays: arr.toSorted / toReversed / toSpliced / with (ES2023) or spread.
Grouping: Object.groupBy(iter, fn), Map.groupBy(iter, fn) (ES2024) instead of arr.reduce + push.
Objects: { ...obj, prop: value } or destructured rest pattern.
Maps and Sets: new Map([...m, [k, v]]) / new Set([...s, v]). Set methods union / intersection / difference (ES2024) are non-mutating.
Date: Temporal (ES2026, native or @js-temporal/polyfill) preferred, date-fns (subMonths, addDays, setHours) as fallback.
TypedArray hot paths (crypto, codec, image, audio, parser, wasm, canvas, encoder, decoder, simd, webgl, pixel, hash, cipher, dsp, signal, fft, ml, tensor) auto-allowed.

State libraries (Immer, Mutative, Redux Toolkit, Pinia, Vuex, MobX, Zustand+produce, Yjs, Valtio, Jotai, XState v5 assign, Solid stores, Nanostores, LegendApp, Tanstack Store, Effect-TS Data) auto-allowed.
Vue 3.5 readonly() / shallowReadonly() and Svelte 5 $state runes auto-allowed when receiver is tracked.
suppression_lines: Standard ESLint and TypeScript markers honored.
